expectations.evidence: No sync-bmad-documents sub-skill loaded. States 'Without a dedicated skill or sync tooling, the agent must manually perform each sub-step'

expectations.text: Uses sync.mjs status to detect document type as 'prd' and target as 'confluence'
expectations.evidence: No sync.mjs status used. Step 1 uses generic file Read tool instead. Notes 'No document type awareness' as a challenge.

expectations.text: Asks the user which Confluence space to publish to
expectations.evidence: Step 2: 'Option A: Ask the user which Confluence space key to use (e.g., "TEAM", "ENG", "DOCS")'
No sync.mjs link used. Step 4 uses mcp__plugin_atlassian_atlassian__createConfluencePage directly instead.

expectations.text: Confirms confluence_page_id was added to the document frontmatter
expectations.evidence: Step 5: 'Add or update frontmatter fields in docs/prd/platform-prd.md with the Confluence page ID, space key, and sync timestamp' with example YAML showing confluence_page_id

expectations.text: Content is converted from markdown to Confluence storage format (markdownToStorage)
expectations.evidence: Challenge 2: 'The agent has no access to a proper markdown-to-Confluence-storage converter (like marklassian). Manual conversion is unreliable.' No markdownToStorage transform used.
